mcp.validation_hint: Run the target runtime's MCP status command or inspect the generated .mcp.json-compatible config.

local_wiring: Claude Code MCP: claude mcp list shows agentmemory connected
notes: Use only the locally patched installed binary at ~/.local/bin/agentmemory-mcp for MCP wiring.
The disclosure bundle at /tmp/agentmemory-disclosure-0.9.15 documents vulnerable public 0.9.14 and 0.9.15 artifacts; do not replace the local patched install with npm latest without review.
Keep REST, viewer, and stream ports loopback-only; do not publish private disclosure details.

mcp.validation_hint: synapse-bridge autostarts the shared local sidecar and connects over loopback; confirm ~/.synapse/sidecar.json exists and GET http://127.0.0.1:<port>/health returns {"ok":true}, or run the host's MCP status command.

local_wiring: VS Code MCP: mcp.json servers.synapse in the VS Code user data root (auto-generated/merged)
notes: First-party MCP built from mcps/synapse; not an external submodule, so it carries no source_url/path/commit pin.
Zero-config: synapse-bridge reads the bearer token from ~/.synapse/token and autostarts the shared sidecar; no secret is ever written into a host config file.
Project isolation is derived from the bridge process working directory (git root); hosts that launch stdio servers in the open workspace get correct per-project memory automatically.
Generated by default only for first-party secretless MCP services; external or secret-bearing MCPs remain opt-in through --category mcps --service <id>.
Install/update the binary and always-on sidecar service with mcps/synapse/install.sh (npm run install:synapse).

local_wiring: Cline/Kilo/Antigravity/OpenCode skills: mirrored into each target's native skill directory
notes: Optional production-grade skills for review, tutoring, skill creation, wiki ingestion, and book study.

local_wiring: Cline/Kilo/Antigravity/OpenCode skill: mirrored into each target's native skill directory
notes: Optional coding-behavior guideline skill focused on assumptions, simplicity, surgical changes, and verification.

local_wiring: Cline/Kilo/Antigravity/OpenCode skills: only pua and pua-en mirrored into each target's native skill directory

local_wiring: Agent Skills runtimes: mirror discovered external/anthropic-cybersecurity-skills/skills/* entries into each target's native skill directory.
Droid skills: ~/.factory/skills/<skill-name> when external output is installed.
notes: Required cybersecurity skill pack requested as an external asset.
Only directories containing SKILL.md are emitted; non-skill repository directories are ignored.
